name: elevarus-os
description: ElevarusOS — internal agent orchestration system, starting with the Blog Research and Draft Bot

scripts.setup:dashboard: cd dashboard && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dashboard:dev: cd dashboard && pnpm dev 2>/dev/null || npm run dev
scripts.dashboard:build: cd dashboard && pnpm build 2>/dev/null || npm run build
